meaning: n.<美俚><贬>参加反战示威的人,反战分子
examples: No one therefore can accuse mr webb of being an effete peacenik.
Most CND veterans see their peacenik days, at worst, as romantic youthful idealism.
My character is an ex-warrior who has become a peacenik, " McShane told BBC Breakfast."
But it wasn't an Israeli "peacenik" like Shimon Peres who withdrew Jewish settlers from occupied land.
After all, a deal made by a rough right-winger is always more likely to stick than one struck by a squishier long-time peacenik.
